chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR. C.P. No. 1599 of 2014. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE. For katcha Peshi. 16.06.2014. Mr. Nusrat Hussain Memon. Adv. for petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain AAG. *************** Learned Counsel for the petitioner submits that the official respondents are harassing the petitioner and his family members at the instance of private respondents. Learned AAG present in Court states that no harassment has been caused by the official respondents in the past and the petitioner and her family will be delt with in accordance with law in future. Mr. S. Jaffer Ali Shah advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of private respondents and has submitted the statement that the private respondents have not caused any kind of harassment to the petitioner and his family. The petitioner due to pendency of Civil litigation has filed this petition. Be that as it may, the statement made by the learned AAG has satisfied the Counsel for the petitioner. The petition in terms whereof stands disposed of, however, with directions to the official respondents that the petitioner and her family shall not be caused any harassment and she shall be provided legal protection at the time of her need. The petition stands disposed of accordingly. J U D G E Ihsan.
